query:
-- Check current state of campaign 30001
SELECT id, name, status, leadsFound, lastSyncAt, FROM_UNIXTIME(lastSyncAt/1000) as lastSyncHuman, subreddits, keywords
FROM outreach_campaigns
WHERE id = 30001;
